task: Research every selected bus stop; identify every route serving each selected stop or stop pair; use authoritative primary sources; return one completed import JSON; do not ask the user what they want done; do not return only prose; do not invent unavailable information; preserve walking/cycling data and identifiers.
authoritativeSourceHierarchy: Official operator timetables and route pages.
TfL official pages for London services.
Local authority or Traveline/NaPTAN information where authoritative.
Other reliable sources only where primary sources do not answer the field.
